'''sawopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jihadization|jihadization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jihadization|jihadization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sawopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæwepeth|sæwepeth]] || [[word:sæwepej|sæwepej]] || [[word:sæwepesh|sæwepesh]] || [[word:sæwepe|sæwepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawowopoth|sawowopoth]] || [[word:sawowopoj|sawowopoj]] || [[word:sawowoposh|sawowoposh]] || [[word:sawowopo|sawowopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawopoth|sawopoth]] || [[word:sawopoj|sawopoj]] || [[word:sawoposh|sawoposh]] || [[word:sawopo|sawopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawofpoth|sawofpoth]] || [[word:sawofpoj|sawofpoj]] || [[word:sawofposh|sawofposh]] || [[word:sawofpof|sawofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sawopotho|sawopotho]] || [[word:sawopojo|sawopojo]] || [[word:sawoposho|sawoposho]] || [[word:sawopoko|sawopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sawopoth|sawopoth]] || [[word:sawopoj|sawopoj]] || [[word:sawoposh|sawoposh]] || [[word:sawopo|sawopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sawopothol|sawopothol]] || [[word:sawopojol|sawopojol]] || [[word:sawoposhol|sawoposhol]] || [[word:sawopokol|sawopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sawopothotho|sawopothotho]] || [[word:sawopojojo|sawopojojo]] || [[word:sawoposhosho|sawoposhosho]] || [[word:sawopoko|sawopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sawopothon|sawopothon]] || [[word:sawopojon|sawopojon]] || [[word:sawoposhon|sawoposhon]] || [[word:sawopokon|sawopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sawopothoro|sawopothoro]] || [[word:sawopojoro|sawopojoro]] || [[word:sawoposhoro|sawoposhoro]] || [[word:sawopokoro|sawopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
